headline: Kinross Gold Buyback Plan Adds New Layer To Capital Return Story
summary: Kinross Gold (TSX:K) has launched a new large scale share repurchase program under a renewed normal course issuer bid. The buyback forms part of the company’s broader capital allocation approach, alongside other uses of cash such as operations and potential growth projects. The decision reflects management’s current view on capital efficiency and how to return capital to shareholders. Kinross Gold operates as a global gold producer and provides investors with exposure to the precious metals...
